10.response: {"Q0":"No, everything was fine. Thank you very much."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I think, it is a psychological study conducted to test the patience, endurance and intelligence of people."}

13.response: {"Q0":"This study was very interesting. I enjoyed this study very much. Although the study was very long, but the bonus at the end of the study made me very happy. Anyway, thank you very much for sharing this study with me and good luck to you."}
